name: @enagar/rag-indexer-bridge
description: Workspace bridge for the Python rag-indexer service. Real code lives under src/ and tests/; Poetry is the build tool.

scripts.dev: echo 'Use Poetry: cd services/rag-indexer && poetry run uvicorn enagar_rag_indexer.main:app --reload --port 8100'
scripts.build: echo 'Python service — built via Docker (see Phase-7 Dockerfile).'
scripts.lint: poetry run ruff check src tests
